DESCRIPTION: Review today's GitHub trending repositories to find high-value projects. For each repo, assess README clarity and onboarding quality, check maintenance health (commits, issues, responsiveness, roadmap), then choose one action: Star, Watch, Reference, or Ignore.

CONTENT: Ensure the README clearly states the purpose and value
DESCRIPTION: Verify the README clearly states what the project does and why it is useful.

CONTENT: Ensure the README has a quick start guide and at least one usage example
DESCRIPTION: Verify the README includes setup steps and at least one practical usage example.

CONTENT: Ensure project health signals are strong across commits, issues, maintainer responsiveness, and roadmap
DESCRIPTION: Verify maintenance health across commit activity, issue handling, maintainer responsiveness, and roadmap signals.

CONTENT: Assign one action to each repo: Star or Watch or Reference or Ignore
DESCRIPTION: Ensure every reviewed repo has a clear outcome assigned: Star to bookmark for later use, Watch to follow updates, Reference to note for a specific purpose, or Ignore to dismiss.
